question: Where are the Orb of Zinthar and the Scepter of Mydor believed to be located?

answers.ground_truth: The Orb of Zinthar is hidden in the Whispering Peaks, and the Scepter of Mydor is in the Sunken City of Aerilon.
answers.original: The Orb of Zinthar is hidden deep within the Whispering Peaks, while the Scepter of Mydor is guarded in the Sunken City of Aerilon.
answers.perturbed: The Scepter of Mydor is believed to be located in the Sunken City of Aerilon.

ops.description: Atlantean cities are built in underwater domes.
Navigational tools on a Sky-Skiff include a Star-Compass.
The crystalline structure of Solara allows for the efficient absorption and temporary storage of radiant energy.
Aerion Wind-Walker Boots are reinforced with Gust-Metal strapping that channels atmospheric currents.

entities.name: Orb Of Zinthar
entities.description: The Orb of Zinthar is a hidden artifact located deep within the Whispering Peaks.

entities.name: Xylotian Chrono-Weaver
entities.description: Xylotian Chrono-Weavers are individuals trained to perceive echoes of past events and create temporal distortions.

entities.name: Scepter Of Mydor
entities.description: The Scepter of Mydor is a legendary artifact guarded in the Sunken City of Aerilon.

entities.name: Xylotian Myths
entities.description: Xylotian myths involve legendary Chrono-Weavers who could allegedly halt time.

entities.name: Hourglass Sandstone
entities.description: Hourglass Sandstone is a material used to make time-keeping amulets worn by Chrono-Weavers.

relations.description: The Orb of Zinthar is hidden deep within the Whispering Peaks.
Xylotian myths feature legendary Chrono-Weavers, influencing the perception of their abilities.
The Scepter of Mydor is guarded in the Sunken City of Aerilon.
Chrono-Weavers wear amulets made of Hourglass Sandstone to keep time.
